title: trifolium patulum
intro: Trifolium patulum, also known as creeping clover or small hop clover, is a type of perennial flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium patulum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
